title: 持つべきか、捨てるべきか

text_block_list.text:
One day, I step into my office and find Biwa
Hayahide muttering to herself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hmm. This section looks fine...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'd still like to test the strength and elasticity of
the fabric, though.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I can't forget to check how the outfit
moves and looks while I'm on stage...

Biwa Hayahide is examining her signature
racewear closely and making detailed notes of
her findings.

She already evaluated the outfit a while ago when
it first arrived and tried it on, but I suppose she
isn't done yet.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hello there, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to ask for your opinion, but do you
notice anything off about my outfit?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You can be honest. I'm trying to identify and
make note of any issues.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well... yes.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You'll probably say I'm overthinking it, but I just
can't relax until I've made sure everything is
perfect.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've encountered so many exceptional athletes
since I entered Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They're able to adapt quickly to unexpected
circumstances and don't hesitate to let go of the
old if the need ever comes.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And they're capable of overcoming challenges
with their extraordinary strength.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: However, I lack such qualities.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know it would benefit me to learn by their
example, but I can't bring myself to let go of the
things I've accumulated over the years.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So the only thing I can do is prepare as much as
possible in advance.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However, this method may forever doom me to
being no more than an ordinary racer.
choice_data_list:
Why don't you try stopping your note-taking
for a while?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?
choice_data_list: Can I take a look at your notes?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sure, I don't mind.

I'm shocked by the overwhelming volume of notes
that I find in her notebook.

There are detailed analyses of every track,
placement records, and strategies on how to
improve her performance before a race.

Everything Biwa Hayahide has learned through
trial and error is meticulously recorded.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Trainer? You're awfully quiet...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh?

The more one prepares for every eventuality, the
more they're able to perform at full potential.

However, not everyone has the ability to do this.
I tell her that her attention to detail and
analytical ability is what sets her apart.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You have a point. That's certainly one way to
look at it.
choice_data_list:
Let's take full advantage of this secret power of
yours!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I suppose if this weapon is unique only to myself,
then there's no need to compare myself to others,
is there?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... I feel like a new path of possibility
has been opened up to me.

There's no magic equation for growth. And that's
exactly why I'm eager to keep learning through
trial and error with her until we find what's right.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I've tried several times...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I've never been able to stay calm without it. I
become so anxious that I always end up with my
notebook in my hands before I realize it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If I truly wanted to stop, I would require enough
nerve to simply tear the whole thing apart.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Essentially, it's true. I'd have to burn that bridge,
so to speak.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I don't even need this anymore!

Biwa Hayahide moves to destroy her notebook,
and in a panic I reach out to stop her. Before I
can, however, her face crumples.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I... I can't do it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't have it in me to compete against such
strong opponents entirely unprepared... I just
don't!

Seeing how stressed she is by this ordeal, I start
to think that pushing her to make such a radical
change might not be the best approach.
Instead, I take a breath and say...
choice_data_list:
That's all right! There's no need to destroy your
notes!

That's all right! There's no need to destroy your
notes!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But if I don't...
choice_data_list:
Don't worry. We can simply do what works for
you!

text_block_list.text:
I tell her there's nothing wrong with taking
detailed notes on items of concern—rather, they
can be a vital tool for her growth.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I really don't need to get rid of them?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Maybe you're right... Maybe it's better to work with myself rather than against.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hearing you say that has taken such a weight off
my shoulders. Thank you so much, Trainer.

We spend time going over her notes, discuss her
most recent areas of concern, and brainstorm
ways to tackle them together.
